allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.get\('dependencies',{}\).items\(\) if 'font' in k.lower\(\) or 'expo-font' in k.lower\(\) or 'icon' in k.lower\(\)}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) d.setdefault\('scripts', {}\) d['scripts']['build:web'] = 'expo export --platform web && node scripts/patch-dist.js' d['scripts']['patch'] = 'node scripts/patch-dist.js' print\(json.dumps\(d, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\) ")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\),path=require\('path'\);function scan\(dir\){try{const e=fs.readdirSync\(dir\);for\(const f of e\){const p=path.join\(dir,f\);try{const s=fs.statSync\(p\);if\(s.isDirectory\(\)&&!f.startsWith\('node_modules'\)&&!f.startsWith\('.'\)\){scan\(p\)}else if\(f.endsWith\('.tsx'\)||f.endsWith\('.ts'\)\){const c=fs.readFileSync\(p,'utf8'\);if\(c.includes\('\\u0420\\u044f'\)||c.includes\('\\u0420\\u0441'\)||c.includes\('\\u0432\\u201a'\)||c.includes\('\\u0432\\u2014'\)\){console.log\('BAD:'+p\)}}}catch\(e\){}}}}catch\(e\){}}scan\('D:/travel_app/app'\);scan\('D:/travel_app/store'\);scan\('D:/travel_app/constants'\);")
Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const buf=fs.readFileSync\('D:/travel_app/assets/icon.png'\); console.log\('PNG signature OK:', buf.slice\(0,4\).toString\('hex'\) === '89504e47'\);")

PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8787 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; "Killed PID $proc" } else { "Nothing on 8787" })

PowerShell($p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; "Killed Metro PID $p" } else { "Metro not running" })
